_comment: Manual layout spec for the Neno Engineering Focus board. The daily 6am job MERGES live Linear data into THIS fixed structure for the initiative view, and uses each initiative's context_sources to build the context page (context.json). JULY SEMANTICS: buckets encode July commitments - 'now' = committed for July AND in progress; 'next' = committed for July, not yet started (Linear project state 'Planned' means planned-for-July); 'later' = not committed. The 'other-july' card is static (no Linear initiative): the job must leave it untouched and skip it when building context.json. Edit this file to change curation. The engineer view is fully auto-generated from Linear.
title: Engineering Focus

merge_rules.initiative_view: Keep buckets and item order exactly as defined below. For items with a projectId, refresh owner (project lead) and status from Linear at run time. Do NOT re-bucket automatically. Buckets encode July commitments: now = in progress, next = committed for July, later = not committed. Cards with static:true have no Linear initiative - skip them for context.json and needs-triage.
merge_rules.new_projects: If a NEW project appears under one of the three initiatives in Linear that is not listed below, surface it in a 'Needs triage' note on that card rather than placing it.
merge_rules.removed_projects: If a listed projectId is completed/cancelled/missing in Linear, render it struck-through with a '(check)' flag.
merge_rules.engineer_view: Fully regenerate from Linear each run: non-archived issues with statusType 'started' that have an assignee, grouped assignee -> initiative -> project -> issue. Ungrouped items go under 'Not belonging to an initiative'.
merge_rules.context_view: For each initiative, build context.json using context_sources: Linear (status updates + issue activity + project descriptions), Granola (folder_id if set, else keyword queries), and Slack (the listed channels filtered by keywords). Lookback window = 14 days. Summarize into the sections defined in context.html. Cache results in context.json; do not summarize on page open.

team_note: The engineer view renders one lane per person in this roster, in this order, even if they have no in-progress issues. The daily job matches Linear assignees to these by email/name. Add or remove people here to change who appears. David left 6 Jul 2026 and was removed; roster is Dima, Mark, Joel, Ihor. NOTE: the scheduled 6am job's own instructions hardcode a five-lane roster including David and must be updated to match.

initiatives.title: Build data by onboarding 5 additional customers
initiatives.blurb: Get the system ready to run AP & AR reconciliation for 5 hand-picked customers. The team's real centre of gravity.

now.label: Connect external bank accounts (Open Banking)
now.desc: Rework the Money Management UI for multiple accounts and let customers link external banks to pull transactions and balances.

now.label: Feature re-provisioning for non Swan customers
now.desc: Make WhatsApp, email forwarding, Vault and Money Management work for customers without a Swan bank account.

now.label: Multi-Client Exact Online Connections
now.desc: Shipped 2 Jul: a separate Exact connection per client workspace, with broken-connection detection and alerts.

next.label: Onboarding Actions for the Next Five Customers
next.desc: Guided Home onboarding hub - connect bank, learn the three bill channels (email, WhatsApp, Vault), a guided sample task; Home hides when done.

next.label: Additional changes for go-live
next.desc: Miscellaneous changes needed to get onboarding customers fully go-live ready.

next.label: Enable invoicing for non-Swan customers
next.desc: Priority: enable IBAN selection for open banking customers. (Team members outside Swan descoped - the first five are single users; manual user-add is the quick fix.)

next.label: Neno account testing
next.desc: QA the new authentication method for neno users without a Swan account.

next.label: Tasks permissions testing
next.desc: Review and test dynamic tasks against accounts without Swan's membership permissions.

initiatives.title: Enable accountants to complete VAT submissions via double-entry GL
initiatives.blurb: Begin writing to our own double-entry ledger so we can confidently file Q3 VAT for 5 neno customers.

now.label: Productionise writing to the double-entry GL (Ocean Ionics)
now.desc: From spike to production - real ledger writes for Ocean Ionics. Spike reproduced real books to the cent; the native engine is green-tested behind a flag. Next: run real production data through it.

later.label: Roll out GL writes beyond Ocean Ionics to the wider cohort

initiatives.title: Make neno the source of truth for all bookkeeping
initiatives.blurb: Scale bookkeeping functionality to manage the books for 30 customers in Q3 and stay in sync with Exact.

next.label: End-to-end AR reconciliation
next.desc: Enable end-to-end accounts receivable - reconciliation for incoming payments.

later.label: Credit note processing (AR & AP)
later.desc: Process credit notes in both directions (AR & AP).

later.label: Depreciation schedules
later.desc: Depreciation schedules grouped by asset type, with a fixed asset register.

later.label: Financial reporting
later.desc: Reporting on top of the ledger - aged receivables (30/60/90/120+) confirmed; full requirements list pending from DP.

later.label: Related-parties register
later.desc: A register of related parties, for intercompany payments.

later.label: Third-party wallet transaction import
later.desc: MVP to import third-party wallet transactions - Stripe plus additional channels.

later.label: Native team features & permissions
later.desc: Native team features and membership permissions.

later.label: Customer project creation & management
later.desc: Let customers create and manage projects.

later.label: Accruals
later.desc: Accrual and prepayment entries; approval-gated post-close adjustments.

buckets.footnote: Committed for July: end-to-end AR reconciliation. Depreciation schedules and credit notes deprioritised for July (7 Jul); quotes MVP already live (NEO-1374).

initiatives.title: Other July commitments
initiatives.blurb: July-committed work that sits outside the three tracked initiatives.

now.label: Accountant UI improvements
now.desc: Fix reconciliation workflow issues already slowing Andries down - full-screen reconciliation review layout (NEO-1347) and bill review interface polish (NEO-1319) are underway.

now.label: Prepare for Bastion pen test
now.desc: Prepare system for July 10th penetration test, as well as essential compliance documentation.

next.label: Swan onboarding changes
next.desc: Modify our onboarding flow per Swan's advice to meet the requirements that unlock additional Swan features.

next.label: Swan Card Cashback for Accounting Customers
next.desc: 1% monthly cashback on net EUR Swan card spend for active accounting customers; v1 is a monthly export file for a manual Swan bulk transfer.

leave.label: Availability · rest of July
leave.note: Mark's leave runs to 7 Aug · Ihor away 13-24 Jul
